name: omnilaunch
description: OmniLaunch - Portable Identity & Workspace Automation Engine
author: OmniLaunch

scripts.check: npm run check:syntax && node scripts/audit-engine.js && npm run probe:lifecycle && npm audit --audit-level=moderate
scripts.check:syntax: node --check src/main/index.js && node --check src/main/engine.js && node --check src/main/appManifest.js && node --check src/main/appAdapters.js && node --check src/main/staleAppData.js && node --check src/main/ipcValidation.js && node --check src/main/importReservations.js && node --check src/main/ipcTrust.js && node --check src/main/ipcAuthorization.js && node --check src/main/sessionVaultCapture.js && node --check src/main/processControlHandlers.js && node --check src/main/capabilityStore.js && node --check src/main/workspaceCapabilityMigration.js && node --check src/main/workspaceCapabilityHandlers.js && node --check src/main/vaultMetadata.js && node --check src/main/launchArgs.js && node --check src/preload/index.js && node --check scripts/audit-engine.js && node --check scripts/lifecycle-probe.js
scripts.package: electron-vite build && node -e "delete process.env.ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE; require('child_process').execSync('npx electron-builder --win zip', {stdio:'inherit', env:process.env})"
